# Juhana Kuparinen

> Software Engineer and Entrepreneur. This is my personal website and blog at juhana.wtf.

## About

Juhana Kuparinen is a software engineer and entrepreneur. This site serves as his personal home on the internet, featuring a blog where he shares thoughts and posts about software development and related topics.

## Blog

- [Blog index](/blog): List of all blog posts
- [Welcome to My Blog](/blog/posts/welcome): An introduction post about the markdown-based blog built with SvelteKit and mdsvex
